} else {

}

    <scriptTask id="ScriptTask_1uteci3" name="Check MULTIPUNTO" scriptFormat="javascript" activiti:async="false" activiti:exclusive="false" activiti:autoStoreVariables="false">
      <incoming>SequenceFlow_0og2h7d</incoming>
      <outgoing>SequenceFlow_0b5c0t2</outgoing>
      <script><![CDATA[try {
    var validData = true;
    var showToast = false;
    var toastMessage = '';

    var invoices_selected = execution.getVariable('invoices_selected');
    var is_multipoint = false;
    var multipoint_invoices = [];

    for (var i = 0; i < invoices_selected.length; i++) {
        var invoice = invoices_selected[i];
        if (invoice.fMultipunto) {
            is_multipoint = true;
            multipoint_invoices.push(invoice);
        }
    }

    if (
        multipoint_invoices.length > 1 ||
        (is_multipoint &&
            multipoint_invoices.length !== invoices_selected.length)
    ) {
        validData = false;
        showToast = true;
        toastMessage = "E' possibile selezionare una sola fattura multipunto";
    }

    execution.setVariable('validData', validData);
    execution.setVariable('showToast', showToast);
    execution.setVariable('toastMessage', toastMessage);
    execution.setVariable('is_multipoint', is_multipoint);
    execution.setVariable(
        'multipoint_invoices',
        JSON.stringify(multipoint_invoices)
    );
} catch (err) {
    execution.setVariable('validData', false);
    execution.setVariable('isAlive', false);
    execution.setVariable('errorCode', 'CHECK_MULTIPOINT_FAILED');
    execution.setVariable('errorMessage', err.message);
}
]]></script>

      <incoming>SequenceFlow_0x10l6a</incoming>
      <outgoing>SequenceFlow_0m3kn63</outgoing>
      <multiInstanceLoopCharacteristics isSequential="true">
        <loopCardinality xsi:type="tFormalExpression">${nrOfAssets}</loopCardinality>
        <completionCondition xsi:type="tFormalExpression">${nrOfCompletedInstances == nrOfAssets}</completionCondition>
      </multiInstanceLoopCharacteristics>

      <scriptTask id="ScriptTask_0p7vg0g" name="Prepare loop context" scriptFormat="javascript" activiti:async="false" activiti:exclusive="false" activiti:autoStoreVariables="false">
        <incoming>SequenceFlow_0b9yfej</incoming>
        <outgoing>SequenceFlow_1j84kdy</outgoing>
        <script><![CDATA[try {
    var loopCounter = execution.getVariable('loopCounter');
    var assets = JSON.parse(execution.getVariable('assets'));
    var skip =  true

    execution.setVariable('asset', JSON.stringify(assets[loopCounter]));
    execution.setVariable('asset_id', assets[loopCounter]._id);

    if (assets[loopCounter] && assets[loopCounter].servicepointid) {
        skip = false;
        execution.setVariable('service_point_id', assets[loopCounter].servicepointid);
    }

    execution.setVariable('skip', skip);
    execution.setVariable('commodity', assets[loopCounter].commodity);
    execution.setVariable('skip', skip);

} catch (err) {
    execution.setVariable("isAlive", false);
    execution.setVariable('errorCode', 'PREPARE_ASSETS_LOOPS');
    execution.setVariable('errorMessage', err.message);
}]]></script>
      </scriptTask>
      <scriptTask id="ScriptTask_02pcdc6" name="Check service point" scriptFormat="javascript" activiti:async="false" activiti:exclusive="false" activiti:autoStoreVariables="false">
        <incoming>SequenceFlow_1ai6klu</incoming>
        <outgoing>SequenceFlow_1au65pb</outgoing>
        <script><![CDATA[try {
    var assetsUpdated = JSON.parse(execution.getVariable('assetsUpdated'));
    var powerList = JSON.parse(execution.getVariable('powerList'));
    var gasList = JSON.parse(execution.getVariable('gasList'));
    var fiberList = JSON.parse(execution.getVariable('fiberList') || '[]');

    var asset = JSON.parse(execution.getVariable('asset'));
    var commodity = execution.getVariable('commodity');
    var market = false;

    var jsonResponse = JSON.parse(execution.getVariable('getSPResponse'));

    if (jsonResponse.code != 200) {
        execution.setVariable('isAlive', false);
        execution.setVariable('errorCode', 'GET_SP_FAIL');
    } else {
        if (jsonResponse.body) {
            var body = JSON.parse(jsonResponse.body);
            market = body.market;
            var address = body.service_address || '';

            if (market === 'l' || market === 't') {
                asset['market'] = market;
                asset['podaddress'] = address;
                assetsUpdated.push(asset);

                if (commodity === 'pod') {
                    powerList.push(asset);
                } else if (commodity === 'pdr') {
                    gasList.push(asset);
                } else if (commodity === 'fiber') {
                    fiberList.push(asset); // tutte le commodity non pod/pdr (es. fiber)
                }
            }
        } else {
            execution.setVariable('isAlive', false);
            execution.setVariable('errorCode', 'GET_SP_BODY_MISSING');
        }

        execution.setVariable('assetsUpdated', JSON.stringify(assetsUpdated));
        execution.setVariable('powerList', JSON.stringify(powerList));
        execution.setVariable('gasList', JSON.stringify(gasList));
        execution.setVariable('fiberList', JSON.stringify(fiberList));
    }
} catch (err) {
    execution.setVariable('isAlive', false);
    execution.setVariable('errorCode', 'GET_SP_FAIL_UNEXPECTED_ERROR');
    execution.setVariable('errorMessage', err.message);
}
]]></script>
      </scriptTask>
